compressed_prompt: I really love the album called Lilith. I want to introduce it to my friend Luheng. Draft an email for it. Add a postscript to your response that starts with P.S.
response:
Subject: An album you need to hear: "Lilith"  

Hi Luheng,  

I hope you're doing well! I was just listening to an album recently that I couldn’t wait to share with you—it’s called **Lilith**. I think you’d really appreciate it.  

The whole vibe is this incredible mix of moody, atmospheric soundscapes and raw, emotional lyrics. The production is so layered—every listen feels like you’re discovering something new. It’s one of those albums that just pulls you in and stays with you.  

I kept thinking how much it reminded me of some of the music we’ve talked about before, especially when it comes to storytelling through sound. There’s a track called “Midnight Echoes” that I’m pretty sure you’d love right away.  

Let me know what you think if you get a chance to check it out! I’d love to hear your thoughts.  

Talk soon,  
[Your Name]  

P.S. If you’re curious, I’d recommend starting with the tracks “Midnight Echoes” and “Fading Embers”—they’re perfect introductions to the album’s style.
